name: Min Soo Kim
tagline: Building safer, more grounded language and multimodal models.
bio: I am a graduate student at Yonsei University, working on `natural language processing`, `multimodal learning`, and `AI safety`. My research focuses on understanding and mitigating failure modes of large language and vision-language models — including hallucination, jailbreaks, and distribution shift — and on designing evaluation protocols that hold up under adversarial use.
currently: Studying alignment of multimodal LLMs under distribution shift
